scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix prompt-lens && pip install -r qwen/requirements_qwen.txt && pip install -r bert-from-scratch/requirements_bert.txt && hf download AgentPhoenix7/SLM-project checkpoints/best.pt --local-dir .\bert-from-scratch\
scripts.dev: concurrently -n next,qwen,bert -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --prefix prompt-lens" "cd qwen && python qwen_server.py" "cd bert-from-scratch && python bert_server.py"
